subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Verily, I have turned away mine eyes from all else but Thee and directed my face towards the sanctuary of Thy all-merciful Presence [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی قد قطعت النظر عن کل الجهات و وجهت وجهی لحضره رحمانیتک
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @martyrs and martyrdom, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @eulogies; reminiscences
